name: Field Tested
description: Agent templates extracted from production — proven patterns for API integration, multi-agent teams, git workflows, and monitoring.
author: ClawDad

setup.title: About You
setup.subtitle: So your agents know who they're working for.

setup.title: Atlassian
setup.subtitle: For Jira and Confluence access. Skip if you don't use Atlassian.

setup.title: Source Code
setup.subtitle: Where your repos live. Both are optional.

tiers.beginner: Single-agent patterns: API auth, polling, rich dashboards
tiers.advanced: Multi-agent coordination, browser automation, git workflows
tiers.recipe: Full production workflows combining multiple patterns

foundations.name: Memory Lane

mastery.name: Full Team

mastery.name: Zero Touch
